item.dc:creator: aycaramba

item.title: My Mom Turns 91 Today (Please Allow My Celebration of The Love of My Life)
item.description:
91 And stll going strong. When she moved into the NYC apartment building behind her, her rent was $70 a month in 1959. Thanks to rent control it's now only $300, 70+ years later. Her neighbors in other apartments pay $2000+ Her landlord could make much more if she wasn't there, but he makes sure any issues she has are addressed the next day after a call. He makes sure she's taken care of. There are still good people out there. She still goes nowhere without her mask. She says the bonus is it hides her 91 year old face.
A day at Coney Island
Last Christmas
Mask is also a chance to add a matching fashion accessory for her. You may see a theme here but she'll tell you she doesn't drink. Ever since I was kid she says "I just get a little taste e every now and then" She's "never drunk", which is true. "I was a little tipsy." But seriously, I never saw her in a condition most would call "drunk." One beer at most before bed.
Last year When I was in 6th grade, 1970s. I informed this woman who had experienced much discrimination, that my girlfriend was White. (Red haired Jewish girl with green eyes. Lori, if you see this, my lucky number is still 4 to this day because of the number of letters in your name) Worried about her response, she said "Well as long as she's not ugly...because you don't have to cross the tracks to find ugly" When I was teen in crime ridden NYC, she warned me that if I was ever arrested, don't call her to come bail me out because "you aren't gonna embarrass me!" Another bit of advice was " always wear clean underwear... in case you're hit by a car." Again, not wanting to be embarrassed if emergency room doctors saw her son in dirty underwear.
Hanging out with other colors. Side note...She thinks Trump is pissing off too many people to last 4 years in office.
At the beach
Mask not over nose, but whatever. The attempt was made. She practically raised my younger sister's son. Walked him to school every day 1st - 4th. This her at his graduation from Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute in Troy, NY, with his masters in Transportation Engineering. Great kid but I tell him his smiles always looks like he's getting paid to do so. When he was 12, he memorized the complete NYC subway map. Could name every station. I once had a t-shirt with the subway map on it, and as 12 year old, he found two items that were incorrect. He really loves trains. He speaks Korean and Chinese and has visited both countries. When in China people would say stuff around him in Chinese and then be shocked that he understood everything they said. He still lives with her. When he returns from outside, he sprays himself down with disinfectant.
Mom with Dad. Dad passed away 5 years ago at 87
Dementia had taken him by then but it was a "happy" dementia. This him 4 days before passing away. Said he was ready to go home, then left us a day later. My younger sister was taking care of him. It was a struggle for her. He didn't remember who she was and she thought he was faking that because it appeared to really kick in when she was asking him to do something he didn't want to do. "Wait, who are you again??" I would call on phone and say my name, and he'd brighten up and say "Hey, son, how you doing, boy!!!" And I'd hear my irate sister in the background yelling "SEE...I told you. He knows exactly what's going on!!"
Dad was a Korean War veteran. He and his brother served. He would have loved this honor because he experienced some pretty racist crap in the service. When my uncle was wounded by a grenade, my dad asked his commanding officer if he could travel to see him in neighboring base infirmary. Officer blasted him with insults, including N-word, and ripped ranking away. A financial hit for remainder of his life.
I was very impressed with military burial and the respect shown.
Great honor. This was when it really hit me.
One of mom's presents at 12am this morning. Big sis found an old brand. Older sister had to search far and wide for this. Very old brand of hers.
Evaluation the vintage of a very old brand.
Just after 12am. She's asking my big sis to wait until the morning. We all call her "grandma". That's the Transportation Engineer grandson talking. We can all be very sarcastic at times. "No, you don't have to blow it out...let it melt down." She gets it. I love this woman more than life itself. Happy Birthday, mom. On all my birthdays she calls and sings "happy birthday" before saying anything else. We'll over 40 years straight now. Every call, since I left for college, ends with her saying "I love you" 3 times.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: Veteran removed from Town Hall over free speech Social Security taken away by DOGE
item.description:
Chuck Edwards - North Carolina Town Hall - Republican https://edwards.house.gov/contact "You're taking away my Social Security." "I will not sit down, I will stand up it's my right." "He's a veteran." "You're pulling out a veteran." "He's earned the right to speak." "What happened to free speech?" "What happened to free speech?"
"Let him speak."
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
is that a wasp? hornet?
can't remember the last time i drank milk
i dont know what this is from and wondering why he's holding cash
i mean..
so why haven't we started yet?
rare to find a deadly sin in your car
mmm hmm
no need to brag
what happens when you turn 35?
forgot how violent this flick is
i guess
treat yoself
bc you cant get beat up
wonder why
a little Aliens humor
hard agree
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Vance booed at Kennedy Center
item.description: This makes me happy. Tolerance is a social contract: if you break the agreement to respect and include others, you can’t demand applause when you take the stage.

item.title: Meta blocks whistleblower from promoting her tell-all memoir. But we still can...
item.description:
Apparently Mark Zuckerberg has never heard of the Streisand Effect...
Publisher: https://us.macmillan.com/books/9781250391230/carelesspeople/
Here's a couple of other easy links to acquire this book, from the tumblr post US store: https://www.kobo.com/us/en/ebook/careless-people-8 UK store: https://www.kobo.com/gb/en/ebook/careless-people-8
Sarah Wynn-Williams, the author and former executive at Meta
https://www.thetimes.com/culture/books/article/careless-people-story-where-used-work-sarah-wynn-williams-review-058czxcg0

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Happy friday yay! I didnt post dis week cause potato. will get back to it whenever now that I caught up on sorting memes. I will be in my discord tonight for gaming! wanting to get back into gaming with more people. all are welcome to join in and hang out. please do be respectful tho if we need coms for the games things. usually just hop in vc and once people start showing up we decide on what to play... Also steam spring sale so suggestions for others are welcome! games ideas: -helldivers 2 -dont starve together -aska (cause new updates) -heave ho (if we can get it working) -cooking games (plateup, overcooked 2, fast food simulator) -supermarket together (cause its free and fun) -unrailed -we need to go deeper -zombie games (left 4 dead, 7 days to die, dead island, state of decay 2) Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
feels like all the time and also nice to have people who tolerate my ranting and talking to myself out loud thinking out loud stuff. I mean I have a nice voice so.
I just attention whore in my discord if I am lacking on attention. or post...
what if. hear me out. I am also a mess.
so much bonus content.
yea I have memory issues too so its like. write down daily in a lil journal thing of what I have done and gratitude work etc etc. and whiteboards. and now some chalkboards!
take it.
heh.
or am just stuck indecisive until I give up and game instead. or sleep.
...
you can do this as many times as you want. I am doing it constantly and also look forward so much to getting rid of all this shitty furniture and moving and getting everything I want. not what someone else wanted then got angry that I didnt *love* all of it when told I couldnt have an opinion in the process of furniture for my own environment that they never were in. fuck that bullshit. /vent /rant
hmm. maybe I should get medication for dis again. tho the adhd ability to do things and get things done around my apt has been working. and I can zone out focused on gaming.
I am a lot of work.
yea. pretty sure I have dis and also when cbt is whats recommended for treatment its what I already do a lot of so no point in getting it added on to my already long list of things.
would be amusing if we all got together and just posted the same memes in various orders in our dumps at the same time...
...
do it.
mhmm. i mean. both is good.
yes please.
yea. its not bad to ask questions, clarify, and understand.
funny how these memes are from months and months ago before it all happened. like I knew it was coming.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "Life is made up of desires that seem big and vital one minute, and little and absurd the next. I guess we get what's best for us in the end." - Alice Caldwell Rice I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk
